message: OPS ROOM v0.24.0 Public Beta is available. Includes RAAS cleanup, FT/M unit selection, Camera Bridge recovery, PIREP/logbook polish, iPad/EFB fixes, update reliability and public beta hardening.
notes: OPS ROOM v0.24.0 Public Beta: RAAS cleanup with selectable FT/M callouts, improved camera/release flow, PIREP/logbook rendering updates, iPad/EFB usability fixes, update reliability and public beta polish.
